options.text: Thank you so much! I really appreciate it.
I'm so excited, can I get a discount on my flight?
I don't need this passport, I already have one.
Thanks, but I'm not sure I'm ready to go.

content.explanation: 正确答案是表达真诚感谢的礼貌回应，符合签证通过后的积极语境。干扰项中，第二个选项提出无关请求，第三个否定对方提供的服务，第四个表达犹豫，都不符合此场景应有的积极、感恩态度。
content.speakerText: Your visa is approved. Here's your passport. Welcome to the US!
content.speakerTextCn: 你的签证通过了，这是你的护照，欢迎来美国！

options.text: Got it — I'll check right away.
I don't have an email account.
Why do I need to do that?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了听懂并立即执行的积极态度。干扰项中，第二个否认基本事实，第三个质疑指令，第四个拖延行动，均不符合‘听懂并承诺执行’的回应要求。
content.speakerText: Don't forget to check your email for SEVIS registration instructions.
content.speakerTextCn: 别忘了查邮箱，会有SEVIS注册说明。
